sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ زَيَّادٌ مِنَ الْبَيْتِ ثَلَاثَةَ أَيَّامٍ فِي الْأُسْبُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Zijad radi od kuće tri dana sedmično.
sentences.translationEn: Ziyad works from home three days a week.

sentences.arabic: يَجْلِسُ عَلَى مَكْتَبِهِ فِي الصَّالَةِ وَيَفْتَحُ الْحَاسُوبَ.
sentences.translation: Sjeda za svoji sto u dnevnoj sobi i otvara računar.
sentences.translationEn: He sits at his desk in the living room and opens the computer.
He communicates with his colleagues via the internet.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ الْعَمَلَ مِنَ الْبَيْتِ لِأَنَّهُ يُوَفِّرُ وَقْتَ التَّنَقُّلِ.
sentences.translation: Voli rad od kuće jer štedi vrijeme putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: He loves working from home because it saves commute time.
